Hero.subtitle: Cairo's most intense tactical arena — laser tag & gel blasters. 30-minute exclusive slots. 6-player squads. No spectators, just warfare.

Landing.gamesLine: Two game modes. One winner. Pick your loadout and own the arena.
Landing.bundlesLine: Themed mission layers to take your tactical session to the next level.

HowItWorks.howItWorksLine: Four simple steps to book your game.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Choose Laser Tag or Gel Blasters. Select 30 or 60-minute sessions. Solo or group bookings available.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Each time slot is exclusive — you get the entire arena to yourself. No sharing with other groups.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Verify your phone number and get your unique mission code instantly.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Arrive 15 minutes early for gear setup. Play your session. Have fun!

Gallery.galleryLine: Raw footage from real arena sessions. No filters — just carnage.

FAQ.faqLine: Everything you need to know before stepping onto the field.
FAQ.a1: Use our online booking system — choose your game, pick a time slot, fill in your info, verify your phone number, and receive your booking code instantly.
FAQ.a2: Yes, but cancellations must be made at least 6 hours before your slot. Please call us directly to cancel.
FAQ.q3: DOES MY BOOKING FEE INCLUDE PARK ENTRANCE?
FAQ.a3: No. Park entrance is 30 EGP/person on regular days and 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals. This is separate from your game reservation fee.
FAQ.q4: WHAT IS THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF PLAYERS?
FAQ.a5: Wear comfortable athletic clothing and closed-toe shoes. We provide all the tactical gear, safety equipment, and training needed for the mission.

Location.locationLine: We're inside Merryland Park, Heliopolis. Show up early, gear up fast, dominate.
Location.title: Heliopolis, Cairo
Location.line: Inside Merryland Park. Come early, gear up, and dominate.

ParkNotice.heading: HEADS UP — PARK ENTRY FEE
ParkNotice.body: Reservation fees do not include park entrance — 30 EGP/person regular days, 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals.

Footer.tagline: BUILT FOR COMBAT — PLAYED FOR THE CULTURE

Wizard.parkFee: Reservation fees do not include park entrance — 30 EGP/person regular days, 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals.
Wizard.depositInfo: 50% deposit locks your slot. We'll send InstaPay / WhatsApp payment instructions right after you confirm.
Wizard.bundleMinWarning: SQUAD MINIMUM · Bundle pricing applies to minimum team size
Wizard.mondayClosed: Pick any day — Mondays are closed for maintenance.
Wizard.slotExclusive: Each slot is venue-wide exclusive. One squad on the field, full stop.
Wizard.justEnough: Quick details to hold your slot. Nothing more.
Wizard.gameOrBundle: Go solo game or jump into a full squad bundle.
Wizard.tuneSquad: Set your squad size and how long you want to run.
Wizard.bundleConfig: Bundle settings — some options are fixed.

Errors.conflictMessage: Someone just grabbed that slot. Pick another time — you've still got options.

Step1.title: PICK YOUR GAME
Step1.description: Choose how you want to wage war — laser beams or gel rounds.

Step2.title: BUILD YOUR SQUAD
Step2.description: Lock in the team size and how long you want to run. Bigger squad = bigger chaos.

StepMission.title: SPECIAL MISSION
StepMission.description: Add a themed mission layer to your game. Optional but recommended.
StepMission.noMissionDesc: Standard tactical session with no special mission objectives.

Step3.title: PICK A DATE
Step3.description: Choose your mission day. Mondays are closed for maintenance.
Step3.bookingWindowNote: Book up to 90 days in advance

Step4.title: PICK A TIME
Step4.description: Each slot is exclusive — one squad on the entire field. Lock your window.
Step4.slotBooked: That slot just got taken. Pick another one.
Step4.noSlotsAvailable: No slots available for this date

Step5.title: YOUR DETAILS
Step5.description: Just enough to lock your slot and send you the booking confirmation.
Step5.notesPlaceholder: Birthday squad? Anything we should know?
Step5.termsNote: By confirming, you agree to the arena rules and cancellation policy.

Success.paymentNote: Your mission is locked. No deposit required. Total is payable upon arrival at the venue.
Success.successNote: Show up 15 minutes early to gear up. Bring your squad, bring your energy.
Success.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 6 hours before your slot. Please notify us if you can't make it.
